app.title: STARTcloud Provisioner Catalog
app.heroLead: The STARTcloud Provisioner Catalog — public packages plus your organizations' private provisioners.
app.introBefore: Provisioner packages consumed by hyperweaver-agent and zoneweaver-agent. Agents fetch
app.introAfter: directly — this page is a human view of the same data. Sign in to also see your organizations' private provisioners.

search.placeholder: Search provisioners by name, description, or repository…

sections.publicSubtitle: Updated {{updated}} — regenerates every ~2 hours from admitted repositories.
sections.privateSubtitle: Private catalog — visible to {{org}} members only.
sections.orgEmpty: This organization has no published provisioners yet.
sections.publicLoadFailed: Could not load the public catalog: {{message}}
sections.signInPrompt: Sign in with your STARTcloud account to see the private provisioners your organizations publish.

card.measuredExplainer: every rule is machine-checked each data run; nothing is self-declared.
card.tierTooltip: Measured quality tier — recomputed every data run

errors.noPrivateCatalog: No private catalog published for this organization yet.
errors.accessDenied: Access denied by the catalog gate.
